Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Appoint Successor-In-Interest To Deceased Plaintiff And To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Suliman Oladeinde of BERKES CRANE SANTANA & SPANGLER LLP (213-955-1150), appearing for defendant Asbestos Companies.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Leave to Appoint Successor-in-Interest to Deceased Plaintiff and to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. sections 377.20, 377.31, 377.60, and 473. No opposition filed. As of the date of the granting of Plaintiffs' motion, the First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all Defendants who have previously appeared. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed order in compliance with C.R.C. 3.1312. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
